description: Examines the state of the art in the use of stochastic network theory to develop performance models of modern manufacturing systems.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (I SY E 624orSTAT/​I SY E/​MATH/​OTM  632) and (COMP SCI 200,220,300, 301, 302,400, or placement intoCOMP SCI 300), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
